tasks.label: iOS: Build (Simulator Debug)
tasks.command: xcodebuild -workspace OAECLegGuide.xcworkspace -scheme ok56leg -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' build

tasks.label: iOS: Clean Build (Simulator Debug)
tasks.command: xcodebuild -workspace OAECLegGuide.xcworkspace -scheme ok56leg -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' clean build

tasks.label: iOS: Test (Simulator Debug)
tasks.command: xcodebuild -workspace OAECLegGuide.xcworkspace -scheme ok56leg -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' test

tasks.label: iOS: Archive (Release)
tasks.command: xcodebuild -workspace OAECLegGuide.xcworkspace -scheme ok56leg -configuration Release -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -archivePath build/ok56leg.xcarchive archive

tasks.label: iOS: Build (Connected iPhone Debug)
tasks.command: xcodebuild -workspace OAECLegGuide.xcworkspace -scheme ok56leg -configuration Debug -destination 'id=${input:iosDeviceUDID}' -derivedDataPath build/DerivedData build

tasks.label: iOS: Run (Connected iPhone Debug)
tasks.command: bash -lc "set -euo pipefail; xcodebuild -workspace OAECLegGuide.xcworkspace -scheme ok56leg -configuration Debug -destination 'id=${input:iosDeviceUDID}' -derivedDataPath build/DerivedData build; APP_PATH='build/DerivedData/Build/Products/Debug-iphoneos/ok55leg.app'; xcrun devicectl device install app --device '${input:iosDeviceUDID}' \"$APP_PATH\"; xcrun devicectl device process launch --device '${input:iosDeviceUDID}' --terminate-existing coop.oaec.ok56leg"

inputs.description: Connected iPhone UDID (use iOS: List Connected Devices)
